text:
Created attachment 232721
patch to Makefile.docs

The issue is caused by this upstream commit:

https://gitlab.isc.org/isc-projects/bind9/-/commit/b42681c4e973fc819a42c36b18cfb59415d0fcba

Here's a proposed patch, which is probably not 100% right, that at least avoids the build issue.
